question.label: Stopped pushing
question.name: You said you stopped pushing — what made you back off?
question.description: Drills into the mentoring thread to surface whether the stall is about time, clarity, confidence, or support.

answer: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.

assessment.note: She names uncertainty about next-quarter ownership and unease, which is a strong clarity gap and mild pullback in engagement.

new_queue.label: Next quarter ownership
new_queue.name: You said 'owning next quarter' feels unclear — what feels most uncertain there?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me right now?

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks focus
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel smoother for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
